In a 200 hotel pan, steam the potato pellets (perforated pan if in bag, regular pan and covered with plastic if out of bag)
In a sauce pot, heat the cream, milk, butter, and garlic, to a light simmer.  Remove from heat.
Allow to steep for 5-10 minutes, then strain through chinois fine mesh strainer
In a hobart standing mixer with whisk attachment, whip the potato on lowest setting.
Add in cream mixture slowly to the desired consistency.
Reserve in pans for service (covered in plastic, in steam oven)
Reserve on sheet trays lined with parchment if prepped ahead.  Cool in blast chiller, then in cooler unwrapped.
